title: Planchonella littoralis
taxonomy: Planchonella littoralis is a species of plant that belongs to the family Sapotaceae. This family consists of about 100 genera, including Planchonella, which is native to Australia and New Guinea. The Sapotaceae family is part of the order Ebenales, which is a group of flowering plants. The order Ebenales is further classified under the class Magnoliopsida, which includes the majority of flowering plant families. The kingdom to which Planchonella littoralis belongs is Plantae, which encompasses all types of plants.
